title: Snap Life
description: This is a Life-Series inspired datapack/mod All players start with a random amount of lives. Can you survive with friends? Or will your world fall into bloodshed?
body:
This is a Datapack based off of Grian's Last Life.

Players will start on 2 to 6 Lives.

4+ Lives - Dark Green

3 Lives - Lime

2 Lives - Yellow

1 Life - Red

Red Lives can only lose their last life if all Lime Lives are gone.
Red Lives will gain a life for players!

feel free to use this datapack in a series as long as you give credit!


I used this Datapack in my One-off yearly series called Festive Life!
